The ABAP environment can now be used as source for data replication to SAP Datasphere. The replication scenario covers both initial load and delta extraction as well as replication from public and custom CDS view entities (details).

SOAP Provider Model

The SOAP Provider Model now allows you to expose SOAP services for inbound communication. The description of the service is done via a WSDL file (details).

ABAP Development Tools

  • Support for SAP-provided CDS aspects to store field definitions and calculations, such as CDS expressions
  • Support for displaying system client in editor tab (details)
  • Enhancements to the refactoring functionality for ABAP classes and interfaces (details)
  • Availability of the server-driven UI editor for ILM objects (ILMB) (details)

ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model

  • Support for the definition of static and instance feature control for fields which have been added for key user extensibility
  • Support for generating custom OData UI services based on RAP BO interfaces using a generator wizard

Administration & Operations

  • Support for displaying and analyzing ABAP runtime errors with the new ABAP Runtime Errors app (details)
  • Support for displaying dependency of scope items in business role templates (details)
  • Support for displaying components to which a restriction type belongs to create incidents (details)
  • Support for using additional metrics for e-mail transmissions and changes to database table entries in the Health Monitoring app (details)
  • Support for using additional metric for e-mail transmissions in SAP Cloud ALM (details)
  • Support for copying restrictions from a deprecated restriction type using Mass Change Wizard (details, details)
  • Support for monitoring system workload with focus on metrics such as ABAP and HANA CPU time as well as processing time (details)
  • Enhancements to the monitoring screens for sampled work process data (details)
  • Support for merging of spaces or pages in the SAP Fiori Launchpad via respective apps

Continuous Integration and Delivery

  • Support for MANAGE_SOFTWARE_COMPONENTS API to work with software components on ABAP Environment systems

Infrastructure

  • Support for elastic scaling of application servers (blog post and details)

Integration & Connectivity

  • Support for adding the AIR key to a SOAP request in the HTTP header (details)
  • Support for configuring event filters for outbound event topics via Enterprise Event Enablement - Maintain Event Channel Binding app (details)
  • Support for integrating enterprise event enablement with Advanced Event Mesh service plan (details)
  • Support for the specification of customized OAuth scopes in communication arrangements
  • Availability of the new function module RS_ABAP_GET_NAMETAB_INFOS_E in ATC scenarios, which comes with new versions of the source code extractor notes bundled in the SAP Note (details)
  • Support for Refresh Allowed checkbox and Refresh Token Expiry Time in communication systems (details)
  • Support for displaying dependency of scope items in communication scenarios (details)

Additional Information

You can find the product page on SAP BTP, ABAP Environment | SAP Help Portal

For technical documentation, please refer to our Standalone Documentation.

Please refer to SAP BTP, ABAP environment Roadmap for more details about planned features as part of the product roadmap.

As always, please let us know if you have questions.

Stay healthy and take care!

entry.title: Getting started with SAP BTP Solution Diagram
entry.content:
SAP BTP Solution Diagram is finally released to harmonize the domain specific architectural diagrams on SAP Business Technology Platform. Though it wouldn't be a detailed blog, I'll list down some important points and references on it. 

So, what' new & different : 

  •         Diagram Harmonization on all the BTP offerings.
  •         Can serve architectural diagram creation on different use cases. Has three layered levels : L0, L1 & L2 to cater different expectations of recipients.
  •         Reusable diagram structures
  •         Can be used with raw.io or Microsoft PowerPoint.

Guideline to use : https://d.dam.sap.com/a/UbBJrVh/SAP-BTP-solution-diagram-design-guideline-v1-public.pdf?rc=10

How to use : SAP BTP Solution Diagrams can be used in two different ways as follows:

  • draw.io - The recommended option. It is an online diagram software for making flowcharts, process diagrams, org charts, UML, ER and network diagrams. it can be installed from Releases · jgraph/drawio-desktop (github.com) & upon installing, SAP BTP Solution Diagram libraries need to be imported from https://github.com/SAP/btp-solution-diagrams.git .
  • Microsoft PowerPoint - Microsoft PowerPoint can also be used with some limitations. The custom shapes and guidelines are present in this template https://d.dam.sap.com/a/e7KMGSu?rc=10

 The entire project guidelines are present here : BTP Solution Diagrams | BTP Solution Diagrams (sap.github.io)

What else? Happy exploring just like I'm doing right now 😊
